# The Outfit House

> New Delhi streetwear and alternative sneaker shop. Sells Entry, 7A, and UA 1:1 grade
> footwear and apparel via WhatsApp-first ordering. Physical studio in Chattarpur, New Delhi.
> Founded 2026 by Gaurav Kumar (digital & sourcing) and Shivam Kumar (operations & store).

## What We Sell

Alternative-grade sneakers, apparel, bottomwear, and accessories across three quality tiers.
All pieces are hand-checked and QC-photographed before dispatch. WhatsApp-first ordering —
no checkout flow, every order is confirmed live with real photos.

### Grade Tiers

- **Entry** — PU-blend leather upper, glued sole construction, generic dust bag. From ₹1,899.
- **7A** — Genuine leather upper, stitched sole, original tooling box + branded tissue. From ₹3,899.
- **UA 1:1** — Factory-spec leather, precision stitching, full branded packaging. From ₹6,499.

### Brands Stocked

Air Jordan, New Balance, Essentials, Sp5der, Corteiz, and TOH (house brand).

### Categories

Sneakers, Apparel (tees/hoodies/overshirts), Bottomwear (cargos/sweats/denim), Accessories (caps/bags/socks).

## How to Order

WhatsApp-first. Browse the online catalog, message to confirm stock and grade, receive QC photos,
then pay via UPI, bank transfer, or COD (available in most metros). Average reply: 7 minutes.

## Key Pages

- https://theoutfithouse.in/ — Homepage, featured drops, grade overview
- https://theoutfithouse.in/about — Founders, story, how the business works
- https://theoutfithouse.in/spec-sheet — Full grade comparison: Entry vs 7A vs UA 1:1
- https://theoutfithouse.in/contact — WhatsApp, Instagram, FAQ, store address
- https://theoutfithouse.in/sneakers — Sneaker catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/apparel — Apparel catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/bottomwear — Bottomwear catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/accessories — Accessories catalog
- https://theoutfithouse.in/policy — Exchange & shipping policy
